heroSub: Professional customs clearance services in Uzbekistan. Import and export of any complexity — fast, legal, and transparent.
svcDesc: From consultation to cargo delivery — we accompany you at every stage of customs clearance.

services.title: Import Clearance
services.desc: Professional customs clearance for imported goods, ensuring full compliance with regulations and minimizing duties.

services.title: Export Clearance
services.desc: Complete support for export operations — from document preparation to releasing goods into international circulation.

services.title: Customs Consulting
services.desc: Expert advice on customs legislation, tariffs, and optimal import/export schemes for your business.

services.title: Bonded Warehouse
services.desc: Temporary storage of goods under customs control while awaiting clearance or transshipment.

services.title: Goods Certification
services.desc: Obtaining necessary certificates and permits for importing specific categories of goods into Uzbekistan.

services.title: Customs Audit
services.desc: Analysis and optimization of your customs operations to reduce risks and costs.

features: Licensed customs declarants with 10+ years of experience
Personal manager assigned to every client
Transparent pricing with no hidden fees
Full legal liability for every customs declaration
We work with all cargo types and customs posts in Uzbekistan
howDesc: We handle all the paperwork so you can focus on your business.

steps.d: You submit a request, we reach out and analyze your cargo.
Our specialists prepare a complete customs documentation package.
We file the declaration with the customs authority and monitor the process.
Cargo is released — you receive notification and all documents.

ctDesc: Our specialists are ready to answer your questions and calculate the cost of services.
